'''vosashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactivatable|reactivatable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactivatable|reactivatable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vosashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosashithi|vosashithi]] || [[word:vosashiji|vosashiji]] || [[word:vosashishi|vosashishi]] || [[word:vosashiki|vosashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosashuthuthu|vosashuthuthu]] || [[word:vosashujuju|vosashujuju]] || [[word:vosashushushu|vosashushushu]] || [[word:vosashukuku|vosashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosashuthu|vosashuthu]] || [[word:vosashuju|vosashuju]] || [[word:vosashushu|vosashushu]] || [[word:vosashuku|vosashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosashufthuf|vosashufthuf]] || [[word:vosashufjuf|vosashufjuf]] || [[word:vosashufshuf|vosashufshuf]] || [[word:vosashufkuf|vosashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosashethe|vosashethe]] || [[word:vosasheje|vosasheje]] || [[word:vosasheshe|vosasheshe]] || [[word:vosasheke|vosasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosashothotho|vosashothotho]] || [[word:vosashojojo|vosashojojo]] || [[word:vosashoshosho|vosashoshosho]] || [[word:vosashokoko|vosashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosashotho|vosashotho]] || [[word:vosashojo|vosashojo]] || [[word:vosashosho|vosashosho]] || [[word:vosashoko|vosashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosashofthof|vosashofthof]] || [[word:vosashofjof|vosashofjof]] || [[word:vosashofshof|vosashofshof]] || [[word:vosashofkof|vosashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosashïfthïf|vosashïfthïf]] || [[word:vosashïfjïf|vosashïfjïf]] || [[word:vosashïfshïf|vosashïfshïf]] || [[word:vosashïfkïf|vosashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosashïfthïfthïf|vosashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:vosashïfjïfjïf|vosashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:vosashïfshïfshïf|vosashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:vosashïfkïfkïf|vosashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosashïfthïf|vosashïfthïf]] || [[word:vosashïfjïf|vosashïfjïf]] || [[word:vosashïfshïf|vosashïfshïf]] || [[word:vosashïfkïf|vosashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosashïfthïf|vosashïfthïf]] || [[word:vosashïfjïf|vosashïfjïf]] || [[word:vosashïfshïf|vosashïfshïf]] || [[word:vosashïfkïf|vosashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosashæthæ|vosashæthæ]] || [[word:vosashæjæ|vosashæjæ]] || [[word:vosashæshæ|vosashæshæ]] || [[word:vosashækæ|vosashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosashathatha|vosashathatha]] || [[word:vosashajaja|vosashajaja]] || [[word:vosashashasha|vosashashasha]] || [[word:vosashakaka|vosashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosashatha|vosashatha]] || [[word:vosashaja|vosashaja]] || [[word:vosashasha|vosashasha]] || [[word:vosashaka|vosashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosashafthaf|vosashafthaf]] || [[word:vosashafjaf|vosashafjaf]] || [[word:vosashafshaf|vosashafshaf]] || [[word:vosashafkaf|vosashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vosashasha|vosashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosashësha|vosashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosashrosha|vosashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosashmusha|vosashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosashyasha|vosashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosashnkshësha|govosashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosashnkrosha|govosashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosashnkmusha|govosashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosashnkyasha|govosashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vosasashasha|vosasashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosasashësha|vosasashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosasashrosha|vosasashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosasashmusha|vosasashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosasashyasha|vosasashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosasashnkshësha|govosasashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosasashnkrosha|govosasashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosasashnkmusha|govosasashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosasashnkyasha|govosasashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vesæshasha|vesæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vesæshësha|vesæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vesæshrosha|vesæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vesæshmusha|vesæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vesæshyasha|vesæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govesæshnkshësha|govesæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govesæshnkrosha|govesæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govesæshnkmusha|govesæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govesæshnkyasha|govesæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vosfashasha|vosfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosfashësha|vosfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosfashrosha|vosfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosfashmusha|vosfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosfashyasha|vosfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosfashnkshësha|govosfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosfashnkrosha|govosfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosfashnkmusha|govosfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosfashnkyasha|govosfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
